title: taraxacum pseudopaucilobum
intro: Taraxacum pseudopaucilobum, also known as the lesser dandelion or small-flowered dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, characterized by its smaller flowers compared to other dandelion species. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones, alkaloids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Taraxacum pseudopaucilobum include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve liver function, as well as its use as a natural diuretic and digestive aid. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its roots can be used to make a tincture or decoction, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine.
